programme.title: EXPTV_
programme.desc: EXP TV is a live TV channel broadcasting an endless stream of obscure media and video ephemera. EXP TV芒聙聶s concept is to evoke the feeling of watching old school television, where nothing芒聙聶s interactive and nothing芒聙聶s on demand. Turn it on and leave it on! Schedule updates every Friday and Monday.
